ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Unique subject identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient gave consent */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial (TRIAL_ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usubjid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the patient (USUBJID) */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., BASELINE, VISIT 1, UNSCHEDULED) */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial (TRIAL_ID) */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physician (PHYSICIAN_ID) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional observations or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES patients ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "paramcd" TEXT /* Code representing the parameter being evaluated */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the parameter values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paramcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "usubjid" TEXT /* Reference to the patient (USUBJID) */,
  "paramcd" TEXT /* Code for the assessed parameter */,
  "avisit" TEXT /* Visit during which the assessment was made */,
  "avalc" TEXT /* Assessment result (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Numerical or textual value of the assessment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the assessment was recorded */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial (TRIAL_ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_paramcd FOREIGN KEY ("paramcd") REFERENCES parameters ("paramcd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_usubjid FOREIGN KEY ("usubjid") REFERENCES patients ("usubjid")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the study protocol */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level defining granular permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique subject identifier for each patient
Date of birth of the patient
Date when the patient gave consent
Type of visit (e.g., BASELINE, VISIT 1, UNSCHEDULED)
Code representing the parameter being evaluated
Unit of measurement for the parameter
Normal range for the parameter values
Visit during which the assessment was made
Numerical or textual value of the assessment
Exact time when the assessment was recorded
Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)
